song.title: Called Me Higher
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I could just sit I could just sit and Wait for all your goodness Hope to feel Your presence I could just stay I could just stay right Where I am and hope to feel You Hope to feel something again
[V2] 2) I could hold on I could hold on to Who I am and never let You Change me from the inside I could be safe I could be safe here in Your Arms and never leave home Never let these walls down
[C1] But You have called me higher You have called me deeper And I’ll go where You will lead me, Lord|| But You have called me higher You have called me deeper And I’ll go where You will lead me Lord, You'll lead me
[B] I will be Yours, oh, I will be Yours for all my life I will be Yours, oh, I will be Yours for all my life|| I will be Yours, Lord, I will be Yours for all my life So let Your mercy Light the path before me
[C2] But You have called me higher You have called me deeper And I’ll go where You will lead me, Lord|| But You have called me higher You have called me deeper And I’ll go where You will lead me, Lord|| But You have called me higher You have called me deeper And I’ll go where You will lead me, Lord|| But You have called me higher You have called me deeper And I’ll go where You will lead me, Lord, You’ll lead me
